stemHtml:
Refer to figure or Amsterdam (EHAM) chart 11-1 from GSPRM 2017. 
An aircraft in approaching category A is cleared for the procedural ILS approach to runway 06 via CH Locator. At what point should the base turn into localiser track of 058° (M) be started?

options.a: 11.1 NM DME range from SPL DME.
options.b: 9.2 NM DME range from ICAG DME.
options.c: 2 mins after passing overhead the CH Locator.
options.d: 1 min after passing overhead the CH Locator.
